title: Finite Product Measure And Fubini Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite product-measure bad probability and marginal QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite product-probability and marginal rows where independent factor probabilities force product mass 1/6 and left marginal 1/2, but the false table claims product mass 1/5 and marginal 2/3.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional product-measure or finite-integration rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure beyond product atoms and marginals; keep general product-measure construction and Fubini/Tonelli in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite product measures as exact rational Cartesian-product probability tables.
Replay finite rectangle, marginalization, and iterated-integral witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for rejected product-probability and marginal claims; the bad product-probability and bad marginal rows now have checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep general product-measure construction, Fubini/Tonelli, kernels, and almost-everywhere theorems marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
